rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 18, 2009, line 5, PLAINTIFF JANET WINGERT Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings. Granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARINA PERLS VS. CITI PROPERTIES 1,LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 18, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFF MARINA PERLS Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Motion denied without prejudice. Counsel's supporting declaration does not comply with CRC 3.1324(b) because it does not sufficiently explain when the facts giving rise to the amendment were discovered. Further, in light of the existing trial date, the proposed defendants would be prejudiced by the amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BRYAN W WIGGINS VS. CINGULAR WIRELESS EMPLOYEE SERVICES, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Application For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, Class Representative'S Individual Settlement And Enhancement And Payment To Claims' Administrator; Points And Authorities, Appendix Of Non-California ,Declaration Of Eric A. rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 18, 2009, line 7, PLAINTIFF BRYAN WIGGINS Motion For Final Approval of Class Action Settlement and Application for Award of Attorneys' Fees and Expenses, Class Representative's Individual Settlement and Enhancement and Payment to Claims' Administrator. Motion granted. However, Order Granting Final Approval of Class Action Settlement and Judgment need to be separate documents. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSTON FUNDING II LTD VS. BARBARETT HENDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 18, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT BARBARETT HENDERSON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. The Court treats this motion for summary judgment as a motion for judgment on the pleadings. The Court grants the motion for judgment on the pleadings with ten days leave to amend, and plaintiff is to allege that it is the assignee of the credit card account. Plaintiff's evidentiary objections overruled. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN GAVIN et al VS. JESSICA JIMENEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 18, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT JESSICA JIMENEZ, and, JEREMY PETERSON Motion For Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Settlement Agreement. Motion for attorneys fees denied. Both unlawful detainer cases have been dismissed and the Court no longer has jurisdiction over these matters. See Wackeen vs. Malis (2002) 97 Cal.App.4th 429. =(302/CWW)
